description: At the end of a shift, the outgoing operations manager must provide a complete handover to the incoming manager.

nodes.task_description: Review the status of all current vessel and yard operations.

expected_outcome.expected: The outgoing manager gets a real-time summary of all ongoing activities.

nodes.task_description: Document any issues that occurred during the shift, such as equipment breakdowns or delays.

expected_outcome.expected: A shift log is created detailing key events.

nodes.task_description: Conduct a face-to-face briefing with the incoming manager, going over the shift log and the plan for the next shift.

expected_outcome.expected: A comprehensive handover is completed, ensuring continuity of operations.
